chapter_title.en: Chapter on Days and Times Recommended for Travel and Days and Times Disliked for Travel

text: 2394 - وَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : «عَلَيْكُمْ بِالسَّيْرِ بِاللَّيْلِ فَإِنَّ اَلْأَرْضَ تُطْوَى بِاللَّيْلِ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2394 - The Messenger of Allah (swt), peace and blessings be upon him and his family, said:
"Travel by night, for the earth is folded during the night."
